Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc

Class JdbcKit

java.lang.Object
space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc.JdbcKit
public class JdbcKit extends Object
Utilities for JDBC and SQL.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nonnull NameMapper
    defaultNameMapper()
    Return the default name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type.
    static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T>
    toObject(@Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull Class<T> javaType)
    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and }ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
    static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T>
    toObject(@Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull Class<T> javaType, @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper)
    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

    Convert the result set to a list of objects.

    toObject(@Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull Type javaType)
    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

    Convert the result set to a list of objects.

    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

    Convert the result set to a list of objects, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • defaultNameMapper

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull NameMapper defaultNameMapper()
      Return the default name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type. The default name mapper assume the column name is in underscore case (e.g. USER_ID) and the field name is in lower camel case (e.g. userId).
      Returns:
      the default name mapper

    • toObject

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Class<T> javaType) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and }ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the element type of the returned list
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type JdbcKit
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • toObject

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull TypeRef<T> javaType) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the element type of the returned list
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type reference of the returned list
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type JdbcKit
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • toObject

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull Object> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type javaType) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects, using defaultNameMapper() and ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the specified java type
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • toObject

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Class<T> javaType, @Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the element type of the returned list
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      nameMapper - the name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type JdbcKit
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

    • toObject

      T - the element type of the returned list
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaTypeRef - the element java type reference of the returned list

      Returns:

      Throws:

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull Object> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type javaType, @Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects, using ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type.

      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      nameMapper - the name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type

    • toObject

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static <T> @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull T> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Class<T> javaType, @Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the element type of the returned list
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      nameMapper - the name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      converter - the converter to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type
      options - the options for converting
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type JdbcKit
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs

      nameMapper - the name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      converter - the converter to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type
      options - the options for converting
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the type JdbcKit

      @Immutable @Nonnull public static @Immutable @Nonnull List<@Nonnull Object> toObject(@Nonnull @Nonnull ResultSet resultSet, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type javaType, @Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws SqlRuntimeException
      Convert the result set to a list of objects.
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set
      javaType - the element java type of the returned list
      nameMapper - the name mapper to map the column name to the field name of the element type
      converter - the converter to convert the object of the JDBC type to the java type
      options - the options for converting
      Returns:
      the row list of the result set of which each row is mapped to the specified java type
      Throws:
      SqlRuntimeException - if any error occurs
